Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for Plaintiff / Moving Party Mark Felker.

No appearance by any other party or counsel.

RULING: PLAINTIFF MARK FELKER's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

There being no appearance by any other party or counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Brayton Purcell LLP, Nancy T. Williams' motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Mark Felker is granted. Counsel demonstrated she provided Mr. Felker with proper notice of the motion and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Not Reported. (503/GLW)
